# Kreeya Design

> Full-service design & digital agency in India offering UI/UX Design, Web Development, Mobile App Development, Digital Marketing, Branding, and AI/Gen AI solutions.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://kreeyadesign.com/) - Main landing page.
- [Services](https://kreeyadesign.com/services) - Our core agency services.
- [About Us](https://kreeyadesign.com/about-us) - About Kreeya Design agency.
- [Contact Us](https://kreeyadesign.com/contact-us) - Get in touch with us.
- [Blogs](https://kreeyadesign.com/blog) - Our latest design & technology insights.
- [Case Studies](https://kreeyadesign.com/case-studies) - Portfolio projects and client success stories.
- [Portfolios](https://kreeyadesign.com/case-studies/portfolios) - Case study portfolios.
- [Privacy Policy](https://kreeyadesign.com/privacy-policy) - Privacy policy page.
- [Disclaimer](https://kreeyadesign.com/disclaimer) - Disclaimer policy page.
